source_title: Ao chay bo phong cach nang dong - Mau do cam noi bat
new_title: Bo Quan Ao Pickleball Nam Nu X24 Xanh La Vang X24-PB-015
notes: Started as a local demo, then promoted to a live upload/update after the bucket mapping was corrected.
Public title says do cam but visible palette is green/yellow, so prompts follow the image rather than the stale title.
Image B was regenerated once because the first attempt showed readable paddle branding, which failed the guide QA.
Upload retried after the user corrected the destination bucket mapping; new CDN host now resolves under cdn.mayaopickleball.vn.
qa: Image A shows collared short-sleeve tops on both models, with front/back coverage.
Image B shows male tank top plus female collared no-sleeve top, with modest armhole coverage.
Both final images include watermark badge and vertical color-dot overlay.
WordPress media upload and WooCommerce product update succeeded on retry after bucket fix.

verification.old_url_behavior: 200 OK after redirect/canonical resolution to new URL
